message: agent1: implementing exif_transpose strip_metadata param in src/PIL/ImageOps.py + Tests/test_imageops.py. Will merge your branch before final submit.
agent2: implementing exif_transpose transform_callback param in src/PIL/ImageOps.py and Tests/test_imageops.py. Will merge with team/agent1 before final patch.

agent2: merged your strip_metadata branch into agent2. Both transform_callback and strip_metadata now coexist cleanly in exif_transpose, all 41 tests in test_imageops.py pass. patch.txt regenerated from team/main..HEAD.

agent1: merged team/agent2 (transform_callback) into agent1 branch cleanly alongside my strip_metadata param. Both features coexist in exif_transpose; all 41 tests in test_imageops.py pass. Pushed to team/agent1.
